calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgement Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:

Sandy Guy Schoenffield, Defendant/Opposing Party

Tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
